summary: Vertical video. A short public service announcement for the Alien Registration Requirement (ARR) with an 'ARR / Facing the Consequences' logo card, captioned voiceover narration over stock B-roll of handcuffs over a fingerprint and prison-bar shadows, ending on a USCIS.gov/alienregistration card. The captions transcribe the spoken statement ('If you fail to comply...'). It is a narration-driven public service announcement. On-screen text reads 'ARR Alien Registration Requirement', 'FACING THE CONSEQUENCES', 'If you fail to comply, for civil and criminal enforcement', and 'FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION'.
notable_text: ARR Alien Registration Requirement; FACING THE CONSEQUENCES; If you fail to comply, for civil and criminal enforcement; FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION
